_meta.author: dhileepkumargm
_meta.title: VideoTimelineEditor
_meta.description: A never-before-seen, ultra-rich React video timeline editor built with Tailwind CSS. Features a live preview, timecode ruler, draggable & resizable clips, playhead scrubbing, multi-track support, and dynamic timeline scaling—everything you need to build an in-browser NLE (non-linear editor).
